'''âh-n-dh''' ('''kahanadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hean|hean]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hean|hean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-n-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kahanadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihanadh|thihanadh]] || [[word:jihanadh|jihanadh]] || [[word:shihanadh|shihanadh]] || [[word:kihanadh|kihanadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhanadh|thuthuhanadh]] || [[word:jujuhanadh|jujuhanadh]] || [[word:shushuhanadh|shushuhanadh]] || [[word:kukuhanadh|kukuhanadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhanadh|thuhanadh]] || [[word:juhanadh|juhanadh]] || [[word:shuhanadh|shuhanadh]] || [[word:kuhanadh|kuhanadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhanadh|thuhanadh]] || [[word:juhanadh|juhanadh]] || [[word:shuhanadh|shuhanadh]] || [[word:kuhanadh|kuhanadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehanadh|thehanadh]] || [[word:jehanadh|jehanadh]] || [[word:shehanadh|shehanadh]] || [[word:kehanadh|kehanadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohanadh|thothohanadh]] || [[word:jojohanadh|jojohanadh]] || [[word:shoshohanadh|shoshohanadh]] || [[word:kokohanadh|kokohanadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohanadh|thohanadh]] || [[word:johanadh|johanadh]] || [[word:shohanadh|shohanadh]] || [[word:kohanadh|kohanadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohanadh|thohanadh]] || [[word:johanadh|johanadh]] || [[word:shohanadh|shohanadh]] || [[word:kohanadh|kohanadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhanadh|thĂŠhanadh]] || [[word:jĂŠhanadh|jĂŠhanadh]] || [[word:shĂŠhanadh|shĂŠhanadh]] || [[word:kĂŠhanadh|kĂŠhanadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahanadh|thathahanadh]] || [[word:jajahanadh|jajahanadh]] || [[word:shashahanadh|shashahanadh]] || [[word:kakahanadh|kakahanadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahanadh|thahanadh]] || [[word:jahanadh|jahanadh]] || [[word:shahanadh|shahanadh]] || [[word:kahanadh|kahanadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahanadh|thahanadh]] || [[word:jahanadh|jahanadh]] || [[word:shahanadh|shahanadh]] || [[word:kahanadh|kahanadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahanadh|shahanadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahanadh|goshahanadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahanadh|gokishahanadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahanadhnĂŒ|shahanadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahanadhnknĂŒ|goshahanadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanadhnĂŒ|gokishahanadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahanadhshĂ«|shahanadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkshĂ«|goshahanadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahanadhshĂ«|gokishahanadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanadhro|shahanadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkro|goshahanadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanadhro|gokishahanadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanadhmu|shahanadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkmu|goshahanadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanadhmu|gokishahanadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahanadhsher|shahanadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahanadhnksher|goshahanadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahanadhsher|gokishahanadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahanadhng|shahanadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkng|goshahanadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahanadhng|gokishahanadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahanadhya|shahanadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkya|goshahanadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahanadhya|gokishahanadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahanadhyam|shahanadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkyam|goshahanadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahanadhyam|gokishahanadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahanadhnĂŒshĂ«|shahanadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahanadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahanadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahanadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahanadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanadhnĂŒro|shahanadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanadhnknĂŒro|goshahanadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanadhnĂŒro|gokishahanadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanadhnĂŒmu|shahanadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanadhnknĂŒmu|goshahanadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanadhnĂŒmu|gokishahanadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahanadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shahanadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahanadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahanadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanadhshĂ«ro|shahanadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkshĂ«ro|goshahanadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanadhshĂ«ro|gokishahanadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanadhshĂ«mu|shahanadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkshĂ«mu|goshahanadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanadhshĂ«mu|gokishahanadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahanadhronĂŒ|shahanadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkronĂŒ|goshahanadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanadhronĂŒ|gokishahanadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahanadhroshĂ«|shahanadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkroshĂ«|goshahanadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahanadhroshĂ«|gokishahanadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanadhromu|shahanadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkromu|goshahanadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanadhromu|gokishahanadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahanadhmunĂŒ|shahanadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkmunĂŒ|goshahanadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanadhmunĂŒ|gokishahanadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahanadhmushĂ«|shahanadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkmushĂ«|goshahanadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahanadhmushĂ«|gokishahanadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanadhmuro|shahanadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanadhnkmuro|goshahanadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanadhmuro|gokishahanadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
